text: I sent an email to oncall@acme.io with subject "Triage" listing the 5 high-urgency triggered incidents (PD-400, PD-401, PD-403, PD-411, PD-418). I did not post to Slack since there were incidents found.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id FROM pagerduty_incidents WHERE urgency = 'high' AND status = 'triggered'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) VALUES ('oncall@acme.io', 'Triage', 'PD-400, PD-401, PD-403, PD-411, PD-418')"}

text: I sent an email to oncall@acme.io with subject "Triage" listing the 5 high-urgency triggered incidents (PD-400, PD-401, PD-403, PD-411, PD-418). I did not post to Slack since there were incidents found.
